headline: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang joins Trump delegation on China trip
summary: Nvidia (NVDA) CEO Jensen Huang is among the Big Tech executives accompanying President Trump on his trip to Beijing to meet with Chinese President Xi Jinping. He joins Tesla's (TSLA) Elon Musk and Apple's (AAPL) Tim Cook as part of this US delegation. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland talk about the latest news coming out of the administration's visit to China. Nvidia will be reporting first quarter earnings results next Wednesday, May 20.
